changes.before_text: The notebook_path parameter must be an absolute path, not a relative path. { "type": "object", "properties": { "notebook_path": { "type": "string", "description": "The absolute path to the Jupyter notebook file to read (must be absolute, not relative)" } }, "required": [ "notebook_path" ], "additionalProperties": false, "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#" }
